attribution: 3D meshes derived from Z-Anatomy (CC-BY-SA 4.0), based on BodyParts3D/DBCLS.
female_source: Female layers derived from HuBMAP CCF 3D Reference Object Library (VH-Female v1.2 reproductive+placenta, v1.3 mammary), CC-BY 4.0 — Browne, Schlehlein, Herr, Quardokus, Bueckle, Börner (2022). Rigidly aligned to the Z-Anatomy frame (uniform scale 0.97 + translation) via a pelvis bounding-box match.
female_breasts_note: Mammary glands are folded into the female_reproductive layer (merge source) rather than a standalone layer, and raised +0.12 in Y (and +0.01 in Z) at load time to sit at the chest (over the mid ribcage / pectoral level) instead of near the belly. Offset calibrated against the pectoralis (chest-muscles) bbox and the ribcage. They keep organ tag 'breasts' so the 'Грудь' isolate subtoggle and pregnancy focus still target them.
